title: Token Holders Snapshot
description: Paginated list of every holder of an ERC-20 token with balance, percentage of supply, and address — essential for airdrops, governance snapshots, and holder analytics.
useCase: Export a complete holder snapshot for any ERC-20 token at a specific block height — use for airdrop distribution lists, governance vote eligibility, and holder analytics.

keyParams.chainName: Foundational chain only: eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, bsc-mainnet, matic-mainnet, optimism-mainnet, gnosis-mainnet
